## Summary

A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Proposed Approach

How you think this could be implemented (optional).

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why they were rejected (optional).

## Context

Any additional context — links to docs, related issues, screenshots, etc.
